name: Incident → GitHub Issue

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const severity = data.severity || 'medium';
const severityEmoji = { critical: '🔴', high: '🟠', medium: '🟡', low: '🔵' }[severity] || '🟡';
const confidence = data.confidence || 0;

const body = [
  `## ${severityEmoji} Incident Report — Analyzed by Aeon AI`,
  '',
  `**Severity:** ${severity.toUpperCase()}  |  **Confidence:** ${confidence}%  |  **Incident ID:** \`${data.incident_id || 'unknown'}\``,
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  '### Root Cause',
  '',
  data.root_cause || '_Not determined_',
  '',
  '### Suggested Fix',
  '',
  '```',
  data.fix || data.suggested_fix || 'See Aeon dashboard for AI-generated fix suggestion.',
  '```',
  '',
  data.memory_match ? [
    '### Memory Match',
    '',
    `This issue is similar to a previous incident: **${data.memory_match.id}** (${data.memory_match.time_ago})`,
    '',
    `> ${data.memory_match.root_cause || ''}`,
  ].join('\n') : '',
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  '### Resolution Checklist',
  '',
  '- [ ] Root cause verified by engineer',
  '- [ ] Fix applied to codebase',
  '- [ ] Tests passing',
  '- [ ] Deployed to staging',
  '- [ ] Deployed to production',
  '- [ ] Incident marked resolved in Aeon',
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  `*Auto-generated by [Aeon AI](http://localhost:3000) · ${new Date().toISOString()}*`,
].join('\n');

const title = `[Aeon ${severityEmoji}] ${data.title || data.root_cause?.slice(0, 60) || 'Incident Detected'}`;

return [{ json: { title, body, severity, confidence, incident_id: data.incident_id } }];

notes: Triggered by Aeon when a new incident is detected. Creates a GitHub issue with full root cause analysis, suggested fix, memory match reference, and a resolution checklist. Requires GitHub credential named 'GitHub Aeon'. Edit the GitHub node to set your org and repo name.
